supportNote.reason: 今回、公式または国内正規窓口のページを開き、記述を再確認した。

sourceCandidates.reason: Official article published 2024-12-04 records SA01 EDU launch price ¥38500 and batch/global delivery; current official purchase page lists ¥42000, so the older figure is not used as current price.

conflicts: SA01 official dimension line says 1350×250×350mm with height in the third position; this is inconsistent with the product's humanoid geometry, so height is needs-review.
Current purchase page ¥42000 and older SA01 EDU launch price ¥38500 are different dates/configurations.
humanReviewRequired: SA01の寸法表記を公式データシートで再確認し、身長を公開する場合はvariantを明記する。
¥42000の版、税込/税別、保証、納期、日本販売条件を確認する。
